views.metaphor: Kitchen counter dashboard with appliance-style stat displays
uniqueElements: SVG oven temperature gauge with animated fill arc
Mixer speed dial with rotating indicator
Measuring cup fill-level visualization
Spinning oven timer stat card
Kitchen activity feed with icon-tagged entries

views.metaphor: Metal recipe box with tabbed divider cards
uniqueElements: Category tab buttons (All, Baking, Dinner, Seasonal)
Recipe cards with colored filing tabs
Progress bars with gradient fills
Category badge labels with themed colors
Recipe count meta indicators

views.metaphor: Kitchen counter with cutting board main area and spice rack sidebar
uniqueElements: Spice rack sidebar with labeled shelf items
Cutting board main with woodgrain texture CSS pattern
Recipe checklist with prep time annotations
Kitchen notes with copper left-border accent
Spice tags with colored dot indicators

views.metaphor: Recipe cooking stages from prep to plate
uniqueElements: Four cooking stage columns (Mise en Place, Prep, Cook, Plate)
Stage-colored column headers with cooking icons
Recipe step cards with ingredient checkboxes
Timer annotations on each card
Recipe name tags per card

views.metaphor: Kitchen planning board with checkered tablecloth background
uniqueElements: Checkered tablecloth conic-gradient pattern
Draggable meal/ingredient/equipment nodes
Color-coded node borders (green meals, gold ingredients, copper equipment)
SVG dashed connection lines
Kitchen tool toolbar

views.metaphor: Cookbook database with copper-foil entity headers
uniqueElements: Entity cards with copper gradient headers
PK/FK badge indicators (green/gold)
Monospace field listings with type annotations
Dotted-border field separators
Kitchen-themed entity names (Recipes, Ingredients, Categories, Cooks, Ratings)

views.metaphor: Organized pantry shelves with collapsible sections
uniqueElements: Collapsible folder/shelf hierarchy with animated carets
File type icons with copper coloring
File size annotations in monospace
Folder open/close icon state changes
Nested indentation for sub-shelves
Fridge door surface with gradient border
Color-variant magnets (green, gold, cream, copper)
Copper push-pin accent on each magnet
Heart vote counts on magnets
Pin It submit button with confetti feedback

views.metaphor: Handwritten recipe cards passed back and forth
uniqueElements: AI messages on avocado green tinted cards
User messages on harvest gold tinted cards
Cooking pot avatar for AI
Recipe-style formatting with lists and bold tips
Working chat input with simulated AI response
Rotatable dial knob with pointer indicator
Appliance toggle switches with knob notch detail
Color swatch selector strip (SMEG/KitchenAid inspired)
Grouped control panel sections with copper icon headers
Toggle button groups for unit selection

globalElements.navigation: Fixed right-rail with vertical dots timeline and connecting line
globalElements.ambientGlow: CSS radial-gradient warm golden pulse (idle ambient)
globalElements.tooltips: Cream paper note popups with copper push-pin icon
globalElements.loading: SVG oven timer countdown with tick marks
globalElements.microFeedback: DING! toast notification with copper accent
globalElements.copperAccents: Copper (#b87333) used for focus rings, pins, entity headers, file icons

librariesUsed.name: GSAP
librariesUsed.purpose: Dashboard stat entrance animations and gauge arc fill

librariesUsed.name: ScrollTrigger
librariesUsed.purpose: GSAP plugin for scroll-driven animation registration

librariesUsed.name: Canvas Confetti
librariesUsed.purpose: Celebration burst on task completion and idea pinning

librariesUsed.name: Phosphor Icons
librariesUsed.purpose: Icon system for navigation, content, and decorative elements

antiRepeatCompliance: Uses avocado green + harvest gold + copper on cream (NOT pink+mint neon from Pass 1)
Uses right-rail vertical dots timeline nav (NOT bottom bar from Pass 1, top bar from Pass 2, floating dock from Pass 4)
Uses kitchen appliance pastels (NOT chrome diner from Pass 1, googie space-age from Pass 2, cinema marquee from Pass 3, soda fountain from Pass 4)
Uses recipe-box flip page transition (NOT horizontal slide, view-swoop, film-reel, or receipt-roll from prior passes)
Uses recipe exchange chat with avocado/gold cards (NOT comic speech bubbles, space radio, or napkin notes from prior passes)
